description: We now label Layer 4 calculations as heuristic, due to the present absence of an effective, uniform lower bound on σ_p as p increases. The change clarifies the non-rigorous nature of this step unless and until such bounds are constructed.
action_taken: We now label Layer 4 calculations as heuristic, due to the present absence of an effective, uniform lower bound on σ_p as p increases. The change clarifies the non-rigorous nature of this step unless and until such bounds are constructed.
